ChurchOS Tenant command center

One dashboard for every church module.

Preview every backend module, manage profile and theme settings centrally, and only publish paid modules to the public church site when the platform admin turns them live.

Demo login: any email and password.

Sign in

Access the tenant workspace, module previews, central settings, and super-admin controls.

Church Context Next Church
Home

Tenant Dashboard

Unified backend for all ChurchOS modules.

View Profile Dashboard Settings
Sign Out

Module Hub

Every module is available for backend preview. Only paid and live-enabled modules publish to the church site.

Central Settings

Global CMS-like controls and module-specific settings live in one place.

Module Details

Select a module from the sidebar to load its backend workspace here.

Module Directory

Use the sidebar as the source of truth for module navigation. These cards summarize status only.

Core Website & CMS

Core Website & CMS Control Center

Create public pages, guide publishing, manage reusable content, and keep church website records tenant-safe.

Operational Surface

The dashboard mirrors the module document without changing the established CMS stack.

Module Identity

Resource keys, entitlement checks, and permission scopes for implementation review.

Website Pages

Search, filter, edit, preview, and publish public website pages.

Page Templates

Start with church-specific structures for home, about, ministries, leadership, services, locations, contact, and landing pages.

Header Navigation Builder

Construct menus and links that direct site users to your pages.

Footer Builder

Control the copyright text, links, and social accounts appearing at the bottom of the site.

Social Media Links

Secondary Links

Reusable Blocks Registry

Save sections like CTAs or Signup Banners to insert into multiple pages instantly.

Publishing & Module Settings

Keep dashboard previews available while controlling what can appear publicly online.

Permissions

Documented RBAC scopes for this module.

API Playground

Suggested public resource contract plus the implemented CMS API used by this dashboard.

Method Documented Contract Implemented Route Tenant Rule

Website Reports

Page Status SEO Content Blocks Last Updated

CMS Activity Logs & Audit Trails

Domain & Tenant

Domain Setup

Configure custom domains and manage DNS mapping for your church website.

.churchos.local

This is your built-in development and preview address.

Enter your registered domain name to map it to your website.

DNS Configuration Instructions

To route your custom domain to your church website, please configure the following records with your DNS provider (e.g. GoDaddy, Cloudflare, Namecheap):

Type Host / Name Value / Target TTL
A @ 76.76.21.21 (Platform IP) Automatic / 1 Hour
CNAME www cname.churchos.com Automatic / 1 Hour
Status: Checking...

Extensions Engine

Platform Registry

Active Extensions

Extension Version Status Permissions Settings Actions

Event Webhooks

Extension Event Trigger Target URL Status Registered At Actions

Sandbox Permissions

Configure which system scopes this extension is permitted to access. You cannot grant scopes that are not requested in the plugin's manifest.

Extension Configuration

Enter custom configuration settings injected by this plugin. Settings are stored securely in JSON format.

Billing Overview

System

                
              

              

                
Modules

                

                  
                

              

            


            
            

              
              

                

                  

                    
General Settings

                    
Configure theme, accent color, site publishing, and workspace defaults.

                  

                

                

                  

                    

                      Light mode
                      Use the brighter CMS-style admin theme.
                    

                    
                  

                  

                    

                      Accent color
                      Applies across navigation, buttons, and module previews.
                    

                    

                  

                  

                    

                      Church site publishing
                      Tenant-level publishing intent. Module entitlements still control live modules.
                    

                    
                  

                  

                    

                      Preview unpaid modules
                      Keep all modules available in backend preview mode.
